sources.title: Jesus Cries (Dystopian Future Fantasy New Testament Full Length Movie German Movies 2022)
Jesus Cries (DYSTOPIE DRAMA | Unzensiert exklusiv für Netzkino-Members)
sources.description:
JEUS CRIES (2015)
Originaltitel: Jesus Cries
Mit: Sabin Tambrea, Emily Cox, Ulrich Brandhoff
Regie: Brigitte Maria Mayer
FSK: Freigegeben ab 16 Jahren

INHALTSANGABE:
In einer nahen Zukunft prallen wohlhabende Menschen und die dritte Welt in einer einzigen unbekannten Stadt aufeinander. Ein Bürgerkrieg bricht aus und überall herrscht Chaos. Petrus, Barnabas, Lazarus folgen ihrem geistigen Führer Jesus von Nazareth auf seinem biblischen Leidensweg. Doch statt in Sandalen und langen Gewändern wird die Passion Christi in schicken Anzügen und in Nachtclubs erlebt.
#Netzkino #ganzerFilm #NeuesTestament

COPYRIGHT:
Spotfilm Networx GmbH is a serious and legal video on demand company located in Berlin, Germany. We are holding a proper license for all of our published movies. For any questions contact copyright@spotfilm-networx.com

metadata.Plot: JESUS CRIES is a modern adaptation of the New Testament. The story is set in a fictitious metropolis in the near future. The First and Third Worlds are reflected in one city. The divide between poor and wealthy continually grows. As insurrection begins, Jesus of Nazareth becomes the political and spiritual force behind change. He is arrested, tortured, and executed. After his death, his disciples are thrown into confusion with feelings of doubt and guilt. They fight over the interpretation of his teachings and their responsibility to his vision. Will they themselves move to action?
metadata.Writer: Andrea Hanna Hünniger, Brigitte Maria Mayer
metadata.Actors: Sabin Tambrea, Emily Cox, Ulrich Brandhoff
